impact: Advances the PP&D guardrail compiler milestone with deterministic, public/redacted fixtures that validate agent-facing gates before any live crawl, DevHub login, upload, submission, or payment workflow.
summary: Added fixture-backed guardrail compiler tests for document completeness, PDF file rules, missing user facts, and explicit-confirmation gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-26: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for document completeness, PDF file rules, missing user facts, and explicit-confirmation gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
